title: pinus sylvestris var. communis
intro: Pinus sylvestris var. communis, also known as Scots pine, is a subspecies of evergreen coniferous tree native to Europe. The medicinal properties of this plant include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Pinus sylvestris var. communis include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function, as well as supporting immune system function and reducing stress. Herbal preparations of Pinus sylvestris var. communis can be found in the form of essential oil, tea, and resin, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
